moments.title: World Cup 2026 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by USA, Canada, and Mexico, is well into its knockout stages, with thrilling matches determining who progresses.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: The World Cup 2026 knockout stages are here! Who are you backing to lift the trophy?

angles.name: UK Teams Focus
angles.copy: Are England, Scotland or Wales still in the running for World Cup glory? Catch all the action and drama.

moments.title: Wimbledon Fortnight Underway
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships are in full swing, with top tennis players battling it out on the grass courts of London.

angles.name: Court Action
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are essential! Wimbledon continues this week, who's your favourite to win?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Any British hopefuls making waves at Wimbledon this year? The competition is fierce!

moments.title: Debbie Harry is 81
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday today, July 1st.

angles.name: Iconic Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry! What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: Style and Music
angles.copy: From 'Heart of Glass' to 'Rapture', Debbie Harry defined an era. Celebrating her 81st today!

moments.title: Vince Clarke Turns 66
moments.blurb: Synth-pop legend Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth Master
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to synth pioneer Vince Clarke! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, his influence is massive.

angles.name: Erasure Love
angles.copy: It's Vince Clarke's birthday on July 3rd! Which Erasure hit is your ultimate singalong?

moments.title: Shane Lynch is 50
moments.blurb: Boyzone star Shane Lynch celebrates his 50th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Boyzone Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 50th Birthday to Boyzone's Shane Lynch! What's your favourite Boyzone moment?

angles.name: Half Century
angles.copy: Shane Lynch hits the big 5-0 this week! Still got those pop star moves?

moments.title: Post Malone Turns 31
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated artist Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to Post Malone! What's your go-to track from the genre-bending star?

angles.name: Birthday Vibes
angles.copy: Celebrating Post Malone's 31st on July 4th! Time to crank up the tunes.

moments.title: John Waite is 74
moments.blurb: British rock singer John Waite, known for The Babys, Bad English, and his solo hits, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to John Waite! 'Missing You' is still an absolute classic.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: From The Babys to Bad English, John Waite's voice is unmistakable. Celebrating his 74th on July 4th!

moments.title: Huey Lewis Turns 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: It's Huey Lewis's 76th Birthday on July 5th! What's your favourite hit from Huey Lewis and the News?

angles.name: Soundtrack King
angles.copy: From 'Back to the Future' to 'The Power of Love', Huey Lewis brought us some iconic tracks. Happy 76th!

moments.title: Shane Filan is 47
moments.blurb: Westlife heartthrob Shane Filan celebrates his 47th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Westlife Charm
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 47th Birthday to Westlife's Shane Filan! What's your top Westlife ballad?

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Shane Filan turns 47 on July 5th! Still dreaming of a world where we can fly?

moments.title: Ringo Starr is 86
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and Love! Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on July 7th!

angles.name: Drummer Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Ringo Starr's 86th! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo's distinctive drumming?

moments.title: Alesso Turns 35
moments.blurb: Swedish DJ and producer Alesso, known for his global dance hits, celebrates his 35th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Dance Floor Filler
angles.copy: Happy 35th Birthday to Alesso! Which of his tracks gets you on the dance floor every time?

angles.name: Electronic Star
angles.copy: Celebrating Alesso's 35th on July 7th! The Swedish DJ continues to deliver massive tunes.

moments.title: Kevin Bacon is 68
moments.blurb: Actor and musician Kevin Bacon, known for his extensive film career and as part of The Bacon Brothers, celebrates his 68th birthday on July 8th.

angles.name: Six Degrees
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to Kevin Bacon! What's your favourite movie role from the multi-talented star?

angles.name: Music Man
angles.copy: Beyond the big screen, Kevin Bacon rocks out with The Bacon Brothers. Celebrating his 68th on July 8th!

moments.title: Courtney Love Turns 62
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and rock icon Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Goddess
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the unforgettable Courtney Love! What's your essential Hole track?

angles.name: Grunge Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Courtney Love's 62nd on July 9th! A true force in rock music.

moments.title: Jack White is 51
moments.blurb: The White Stripes' co-founder and prolific musician, Jack White, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White! What's your favourite White Stripes riff?

angles.name: Music Maverick
angles.copy: From The White Stripes to solo brilliance, Jack White turns 51 on July 9th! A true rock innovator.

moments.title: Marc Almond Turns 69
moments.blurb: Soft Cell's iconic frontman, Marc Almond, celebrates his 69th birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Synth-pop Sensation
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to Marc Almond! 'Tainted Love' is still a timeless classic.

angles.name: Soft Cell Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Marc Almond's 69th on July 9th! A distinctive voice and style that defined the 80s.

moments.title: Jim Kerr is 67
moments.blurb: Simple Minds frontman Jim Kerr celebrates his 67th birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Simple Minds Leader
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Jim Kerr! 'Don't You (Forget About Me)' is forever a classic.

angles.name: Stadium Rock Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating Jim Kerr's 67th on July 9th! What's your favourite Simple Minds anthem?

moments.title: Debbie Sledge is 72
moments.blurb: Debbie Sledge, a founding member of the legendary R&B group Sister Sledge, celebrates her 72nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Family Affair
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to Debbie Sledge! 'We Are Family' is still an anthem for the ages.

angles.name: Disco Diva
angles.copy: Celebrating Debbie Sledge's 72nd on July 9th! Get ready to hit the dance floor with some Sister Sledge classics.

moments.title: Jessica Simpson Turns 46
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and TV personality Jessica Simpson celebrates her 46th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to Jessica Simpson! What's your favourite hit from the pop superstar?

angles.name: Reality Star
angles.copy: Celebrating Jessica Simpson's 46th on July 10th! From 'Newlyweds' to fashion mogul, she's done it all.
